name: undo_redo_app_state
description: Mini-git undo/redo of the whole app-state RefAny via the E2E ops (commit_undo_snapshot / undo_app_state / redo_app_state), backed by RefAnyUndoManager (reversible JSON diffs). Run against examples/c/hello-world.c, whose model is JSON-serializable via AZ_REFLECT_JSON and serializes as { "counter": N }. The test is model-light: set_app_state seeds each state, so only the 'counter' field matters. Each commit records the diff vs the previous commit; undo/redo walk the history; committing a new state after an undo discards the orphaned redo branch (git-like). Driven by tests/e2e/undo-redo.sh in CI.
